findings.title: open-compass/opencompass
findings.description: OpenCompass is an LLM evaluation platform, supporting a wide range of models (Llama3, Mistral, InternLM2,GPT-4,LLaMa2, Qwen,GLM, Claude, etc) over 100+ datasets.

findings.title: FreedomIntelligence/Awesome-AI4Med
findings.description: [Medical_NLP ➟ Awesome-AI4Med] medical-related LLMs, Multimodal systems, Datasets, Benchmarks, and more.

findings.title: beir-cellar/beir
findings.description: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Information Retrieval. Easy to use, evaluate your models across 15+ diverse IR datasets.

findings.title: openai/SWELancer-Benchmark
findings.description: This repo contains the dataset and code for the paper "SWE-Lancer: Can Frontier LLMs Earn $1 Million from Real-World Freelance Software Engineering?"

findings.title: DataScienceUIBK/Rankify
findings.description: 🔥 Rankify: A Comprehensive Python Toolkit for Retrieval, Re-Ranking, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation 🔥. Our toolkit integrates 40 pre-retrieved benchmark datasets and supports 7+ retrieval techniques, 24+ state-of-the-art Reranking models, and multiple RAG methods.

findings.title: onejune2018/Awesome-LLM-Eval
findings.description: Awesome-LLM-Eval: a curated list of tools, datasets/benchmark, demos, leaderboard, papers, docs and models, mainly for Evaluation on LLMs.  一个由工具、基准/数据、演示、排行榜和大模型等组成的精选列表，主要面向基础大模型评测，旨在探求生成式AI的技术边界.

findings.title: HowieHwong/TrustLLM
findings.description: [ICML 2024] TrustLLM: Trustworthiness in Large Language Models

findings.title: leobeeson/llm_benchmarks
findings.description: A collection of benchmarks and datasets for evaluating LLM.

findings.title: zhenbench/z-bench
findings.description: Z-Bench 1.0 by 真格基金：一个麻瓜的大语言模型中文测试集。Z-Bench is a LLM prompt dataset for non-technical users, developed by an enthusiastic AI-focused team in Zhenfund.

findings.title: adlnlp/FinLLMs
findings.description: This repository contains related work, benchmarks and datasets for the paper "Large Language Models in Finance (FinLLMs)".

findings.description: Multilingual Medicine: Model, Dataset, Benchmark, Code

findings.description: [ICLR 2025] xFinder: Large Language Models as Automated Evaluators for Reliable Evaluation

findings.title: alibaba/aacr-bench
findings.description: An Alibaba open-source multi-language benchmark for evaluating LLMs in repository-level automatic code review, featuring an AI-assisted and expert-verified dataset.

findings.description: [EMNLP'21] Visual News: Benchmark and Challenges in News Image Captioning
